title: PcEoTllar Light Up Dog Collar - Rechargeable, Waterproof, Adjustable LED Collar for Night - Flashing, Glowing for Small Medium Large Dogs - Blue-S
features: Super Visibility Light Up Dog Collar: The LED dog collar features highly luminous lights, ensuring that your dog is visible from a long distance. It offers excellent visibility, making your dog noticeable to everyone, including cyclists, pedestrians, and drivers, even in the darkest conditions.

LED Dog Collar with USB Charging Cable: Tired of constantly replacing batteries? This dog collar is equipped with a built - in large capacity rechargeable battery. It can provide up to 10 hours of illumination after just 2 hours of charging. This means you can enjoy multiple outings with your dog without worrying about running out of power.

3 Glowing Modes to Meet Your Needs: The collar has a single - button control for 3 different lighting modes: rapid flash, slow flash, and steady light. You can easily switch between these modes to suit various situations, creating different atmospheres during your walks with your dog. It adds both safety and enjoyment to your nighttime walks.

Water-Resistant and Sturdy Flashing Dog Collar: Made from robust nylon material, this dog collar is not only durable but also comfortable for your pet. It comes with a sturdy D - ring, allowing you to attach any leash. The collar is water - resistant, meaning it can withstand rainy and snowy weather. However, it's not suitable for long - term immersion in water, such as when your dog is swimming.

Multi-Colour & Adjustable Size Collars: Choose from 4 colours and three adjustable sizes on our solid-colour collars, each featuring three lighting modes. Of course, you can also opt for our multi-colour collar with seven colour options in one collar.Our collars cater to your daily dog walking needs.
description: Product Description PcEoTllar LIGHT UP DOG COLLAR WITH 3 MODES Light Up Dog Collar - A Nighttime Beacon of Pet Safety Safety first! This light up dog collar is ingeniously designed with a powerful light function. In the dark of the night, during walks in the early morning or in areas with little light such as parks after sunset, the collar radiates a brilliant and steady glow. It ensures that your dog is clearly visible from a distance, so you can easily track him and alert passers-by and drivers, minimize risks and keep your pet safe. Durability guaranteed. Made from high quality materials and precise seams, our Glowing Dog Collar can withstand the rigors of your dog's active lifestyle. Whether your dog loves to race through bushes, roll in the grass or engage in a tug-of-war game, this collar will stay upright and maintain its shine and integrity. Superior Comfort. We understand that the comfort of your dog is crucial. That's why our collar is made of high-quality, soft and skin-friendly materials. The smooth texture does not irritate your dog's neck, so it can be worn comfortably all day long. Lightweight and flexible, it adapts to your dog's every move, whether it's running, jumping or just hanging around. Make your dog stand out and stay safe with our Glowing Dog Collar. It's not just a collar. It is a sign of love and care for your four-legged family member. Make your dog shine! LIGHT UP DOG COLLAR RECHARGEBLE
